ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the film was produced */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Official release date of the film */,
  "runtime" TEXT /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description or summary of the film */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the film (out of 10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., DVD, Blu-ray, Digital) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the format (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_formats" (
  "film_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-format association */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format available for the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film in the specified format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_formats_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_formats_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Drama, Comedy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-genre association */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_genres_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filmmakers" (
  "filmmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filmmaker */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the filmmaker */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the filmmaker */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the filmmaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the filmmaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filmmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_filmmakers" (
  "film_filmmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-filmmaker association */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "filmmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filmmaker associated with the film */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the filmmaker (e.g., Director, Producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_filmmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_filmmakers_filmmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("filmmaker_id") REFERENCES filmmakers ("filmmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_filmmakers_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the actor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_actors" (
  "film_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-actor association */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor associated with the film */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_actors_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., film analyst, distributor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 10) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
